case_title: FIRST SELECT, INC. VS. VERA O MEDLOCK et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST SELECT, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MEDLOCK, VERA O DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          APR-26-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-19-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAR-29-2002

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-05-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). OSC TO PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY. THE APR-26-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEDLOCK, VERA O $4,729.21 PRINCIPAL, $154.19 INTEREST, $141.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,024.40, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5024.40. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
